final_prompt.prompt:
Create a full-screen brand launch marketing poster displayed as an OPPO smartphone screenshot, for the OPPO Find X9 Pro new product reveal campaign.

Style/medium: photorealistic smartphone UI screenshot, sleek tech-brand editorial in the spirit of high-impact product launch visuals (Apple/Samsung keynote aesthetic), flat-rendered on a phone display
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout at 9:16, centered hero product image with bold headline text, generous negative space above and below the device, no status-bar clutter
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone as hero product, shown at a dramatic three-quarter angle, ultra-thin bezels, glossy ceramic back panel catching light
Scene/backdrop: deep black or near-black gradient background, subtle radial glow emanating from behind the device
Lighting/mood: single dramatic rim light from upper-left, cool blue-white specular highlight on device edges, high contrast between device and background, visually striking and bold
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, OPPO brand green (#1F8A4C range) as accent, cool white for typography, minimal color count for maximum impact
Materials/textures: mirror-polished glass back with faint reflection, anodized metal frame with sharp edge highlight
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: must read as a realistic smartphone screen screenshot at 1080×1920; UI chrome (status bar, navigation bar) should be minimal or hidden to maximize visual real estate; brand name must be legible
Avoid: cartoonish gradients, lens flare overload, cluttered UI elements, watermarks, generic stock-photo lighting, washed-out colors
